nasb.text: There is no one holy like the Lord, Indeed, there is no one besides You, Nor is there any rock like our God.

esv.text: “There is none holy like the Lord: for there is none besides you; there is no rock like our God.

cnv.text: 沒有人像耶和華那麼聖潔， 因為除你以外沒有別的神， 也沒有磐石像我們的　神。

ccb.text: “耶和华圣洁无比， 独一无二， 没有磐石像我们的上帝。
